problem: Flex items stay on one line and overflow horizontally when space runs out
note: Whether a single-line flex row is intentional or a bug needs the rendered width; a static rule would flag every legitimate nowrap toolbar.

problem: A fixed-ratio img squashes or stretches when the source aspect ratio differs
note: object-fit need is conditional on the source vs box ratio; not knowable from static HTML without the asset.

problem: User-generated text overruns its container and breaks the layout
defensive_pattern: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis
note: Whether text actually overflows needs scrollWidth vs clientWidth; cataloged for the .mjs sweep.

problem: Adjacent elements collide when one side's content grows
defensive_pattern: margin between title and action, added ahead of time
note: A craft habit (reserve spacing preemptively); collision only shows when rendered with long content.

problem: auto-fit stretches a lone grid item across the whole row unexpectedly
note: Prefer auto-fill over auto-fit; whether the stretch is unwanted depends on intent and item count.

problem: A non-tiling background image tiles when the box is larger than the image
note: Statically checkable: a background-image:url() that is not a gradient and has no background-repeat. Low-FP if scoped to url() backgrounds.

problem: Fixed grid track widths (250px 1fr) force horizontal scroll on small viewports
defensive_pattern: wrap fixed-track grid in a min-width media query
note: Needs viewport-relative evaluation; whether tracks overflow is a rendered concern.

problem: A var() resolves to nothing and the property breaks when the variable is undefined
note: Most var() use is safe because the variable IS defined in scope; a static rule would false-positive on nearly every design-token page. Judgment, not a rule.

problem: Hard-coded width/height clips content that grows beyond it
defensive_pattern: prefer min-width/min-height (or max-*) over fixed width/height
note: Fixed sizes are often correct (icons, avatars); flagging them blindly is noise.

problem: A flex item won't shrink below its content so long text/images overflow the row
note: Only matters when the child is wider than the item; needs box metrics to know.

problem: A grid item won't shrink below content size and overflows the track
defensive_pattern: minmax(0, 1fr) or min-width: 0 on the item
note: Same as flexbox-min-content-size: overflow is a rendered condition.

problem: Comma-grouping vendor-prefixed selectors invalidates the whole rule
defensive_pattern: write each vendor selector as its own rule, not comma-grouped
note: Cataloged static; rare in generated output and high-FP to detect reliably (valid grouped non-vendor selectors abound). Kept as judgment-grade reference, no rule.

problem: An img wider than its container overflows the page
note: Statically checkable when an inline-styled img sets a fixed width but no max-width — scoped tightly to keep FP low.

problem: A position:sticky grid/flex item stretches to full height and never sticks
defensive_pattern: align-self: start on the sticky item
note: Whether the stretch defeats sticky needs layout; the fix is a craft habit.

problem: Scrolling to the end of a modal/overlay scrolls the page behind it
note: Identifying a scrollable overlay that needs containment requires resolving overflow + stacking context; rendered/judgment, not a clean static rule.

problem: Layout shifts sideways when a scrollbar appears on long content
note: Reserving the gutter is a per-container judgment; flagging its absence everywhere would be noise.

problem: overflow:scroll always shows a scrollbar even with no overflow
note: Statically checkable: overflow:scroll vs auto. Low value/high taste — kept judgment; auto is preferred but scroll is sometimes deliberate.

problem: justify-content:space-between leaves uneven gaps when item count varies
defensive_pattern: prefer gap; reserve space-between for fixed item counts
note: Whether space-between looks wrong depends on item count and intent.

problem: Text over an image becomes unreadable if the image fails to load
note: Adding a fallback bg-color to the img (and a scrim for legibility) is a craft habit; legibility itself is a rendered/contrast concern.

problem: Sticky/absolute elements overlap when the viewport is short
note: Knowing a layout needs a vertical breakpoint requires rendering at short heights.

problem: A half-tap while scrolling triggers a sticky hover state on touch devices
note: Flagging every bare :hover would false-positive massively; whether it matters is device-conditional. Cataloged for judgment/rendered.

problem: A light image/avatar blends into a light background with no visible edge
defensive_pattern: inset box-shadow / overlay ring on a wrapper (img can't take inset shadow)
note: A polish touch for avatars on matching backgrounds; not mechanically detectable.

problem: Flex items stretch to the tallest sibling (e.g. an avatar stretched by a long bio)
defensive_pattern: align-items: center/start (or align-self on the item)
note: Whether stretching is unwanted depends on content heights at render time.

problem: iOS Safari zooms the page when focusing an input with font-size < 16px
note: Real, deterministic iOS bug. Statically checkable: a form control (or a rule targeting one) with font-size < 16px. High confidence, important severity.

problem: A button sized to its label gets too small to tap when the label is short (i18n)
note: Meaningful min-width is layout/i18n dependent; not reliably checkable static. See forms-craft.md + i18n-rtl.md.
